descriptions.image_compare: Side-by-side image comparison with a divider, magnifier, and analysis tools.

recent.title: Recent
recent.empty_hint: Drop a .imgsli file here to pin it
recent.empty: Saved projects appear here after you open or save a .imgsli file. Drop a project file here to pin it to this list.
recent.cap_evicted: Recent list is full ({cap}). Dropped “{name}” to make room for the new project — known limit for now. If you need a higher cap, open a GitHub issue ({url}); you may be the first.
